things.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Baroque church housing the remains of St Francis Xavier

things.name: Calangute & Baga Beach
things.description: Goa's most popular North Goa beaches with beach shacks, watersports and nightlife

things.name: Palolem Beach (South Goa)
things.description: Crescent bay with palm trees and calm water - Goa's most beautiful beach

things.name: Old Goa Churches
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Portuguese colonial churches including Se Cathedral - India's largest

things.name: Spice Plantation Tour
things.description: Tour of a working plantation with cardamom, vanilla, nutmeg and elephant encounters

things.name: Dudhsagar Waterfall
things.description: Four-tiered 600m waterfall - India's fifth highest - deep in the Goa jungle

things.name: Anjuna Flea Market (Wednesday)
things.description: Legendary 1960s hippie market with Kashmiri traders, Tibetan jewellery and beach fashion

things.name: Chapora Fort Sunset
things.description: Portuguese fort made famous by the Bollywood film Dil Chahta Hai

things.name: Night Fishing Trip
things.description: Go out with local fishermen on a traditional Goan fishing boat at sunset

things.name: Prawn Balchao & Bebinca
things.description: Goa's fiery pickled prawn curry and the layered coconut toddy egg pudding
